questions.question: What D-word describes the scattering of the Jewish people around the world?
What Glenn Close movie did critic Andrea Shaw describe as 'the one-night stand who won't go away'?
What pro athlete did Fortune claim added $10 billion to the U.S. economy, in 1998?
What future shrink's first scientific paper was based on his dissection of 400 eels to determine if they had testes, in 1877?
What sports league grew from a maximum of 96 players in 1956 to 348 in 1998?
What nation has produced 76 percent of the world's serial killers, according to The A to Z Encyclopedia of Serial Killers?
